title: Nicholas II Killer

title: Shotgun Patterning
description: Why do hunters pattern their shotguns and what benefits does this practice provide?
narrative: The user wants a clear explanation of the purpose and advantages of shotgun patterning for hunters, including how it helps select shells, chokes, and loads, ensures accuracy at hunting distances, and may indicate needed gun adjustments. Relevant material should describe these reasons, benefits, and the basic method of testing a shotgun’s pattern.

title: Pete Rose Ban
description: What are the reasons behind Pete Rose's ban from the Baseball Hall of Fame?
narrative: The user wants a clear explanation of the events and policies that led to Pete Rose’s permanent exclusion from the Hall of Fame, including details of his gambling scandal, MLB’s disciplinary actions, and any related commentary on his eligibility. Relevant content should describe the 1989 betting revelations, the resulting ban, and statements from officials about why the ban remains in effect.

title: Geon Definition
description: What does the term 'geon' mean?
narrative: The user wants a clear definition of the word 'geon', including any prominent senses of the term. Relevant results should provide authoritative explanations of the psychological concept (simple geometric shape components used in visual perception) and the chemical/material sense (a polyvinyl resin used in plastics), indicating the domain, usage, and examples. Documents that merely mention the word without defining it are not relevant.

title: Pareto Chart
description: What is a Pareto chart and how is it defined and used in statistics?
narrative: The user seeks a clear definition of a Pareto chart, including its visual components (descending bars plus cumulative line), its statistical purpose (highlighting the few most significant causes among many), and typical contexts or examples of its application. Relevant documents should explicitly define the chart, describe its construction and interpretation, and relate it to the Pareto principle (80/20 rule).

title: Whitening Clothes

Relevant documents should discuss whitening techniques, chemical agents, and best practices for achieving white clothing.

title: Radio Wave Medium
description: What medium do radio waves travel through?
narrative: The user seeks a concise explanation of the physical medium(s) that support radio wave propagation, including whether a material medium is required, the role of vacuum, and how other media (air, water, solids) affect the waves. Relevant documents should describe electromagnetic wave behavior, note that radio waves can travel through vacuum and various non‑metallic media, and discuss phenomena such as refraction, diffraction, and attenuation in different substances.

title: UN FAO Definition

title: Geologic Nonconformity Definition
description: What does the term nonconformity mean in earth science?
narrative: The user wants a concise, authoritative definition of a nonconformity as used in geology, including how it differs from other unconformities and the rock types it involves. Relevant material should explain that a nonconformity is an unconformity where sedimentary rocks overlie eroded igneous or metamorphic rocks, describe the erosional hiatus it represents, and optionally reference related concepts such as disconformities and blended unconformities.

title: OKC Workplace Discrimination
